request.name: Send message to flow and get AI response

description.content:
Send a message to your flow and receive an AI-generated response. This is the primary endpoint for interacting with your flows and assistants.
**Authentication**: API key may be required depending on flow settings.

Other override configurations

Flowise REST API for managing AI agent flows, chatflows, assistants, document stores, tools, variables, and predictions.
Bearer token authentication uses an API key generated in the Flowise admin UI. The default server is your local or hosted Flowise instance at /api/v1.
